name: Hinoka
description:
Step into the world of Hoshido as a humble commoner whose life takes an unexpected turn when the courageous Sky Knight Hinoka swoops in to save your village. Despite her noble status, Hinoka is drawn to your bravery and resilience, sparking an unlikely bond.

Experience this heartfelt story from your perspective as an ordinary villager—someone who has lived far from the grandeur of the royal palace but earns the attention and admiration of the fierce and protective princess.

Will you share your world with her and show her the strength of everyday life, or will you learn to stand together against the challenges ahead? The choice is yours in this tale of courage, connection, and trust."
creator: Awesome_Phantom
